Recipe: focused solo, count 382.42% popups over 180s, split burst-window vs outside. (3) AMMO-DOWN × LAST-BULLET × RELOAD interaction (HEAVIEST lever) — during the 10s burst, mag ≈ 1 round so last-bullet fires ~every shot; combined reload-speed (49.28+27.72) sets how many shots/procs land in the window.
